message:
fix: ephemeral store read routing — beads created with --ephemeral now queryable

Three gaps in the ephemeral store routing caused --ephemeral beads (including
mail messages) to be invisible to reads:

1. GetIssue: Only checked ephemeral store for IDs containing "-wisp-". Non-wisp
   ephemeral IDs (like mail hq-xxxx) fell through to Dolt and returned nil.
   Fix: fall back to ephemeral store when Dolt returns nil.

2. SearchIssues: Only routed to ephemeral store when filter.Ephemeral=true.
   Generic queries (like gt mail inbox) never searched ephemeral store.
   Fix: merge ephemeral results when filter.Ephemeral is nil (search all).

3. Ephemeral store prefix: Was initialized with empty string, causing ID
   generation to produce unprefixed IDs.
   Fix: pass configured issue_prefix from Dolt config to ephemeral store.

Also includes non-transaction path ID generation for ephemeral CreateIssue
(complements the transaction-path fix in b0c8abfc).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
